features.name: Demo Prototype (pre-harness)
features.description: TeamMaster 2.0 demo built across waves P1-P6 before adopting the harness system: Dashboard (calm/focus, pan-zoom canvas), Nexus (multi-thread orchestration, follow-up, errand cases), rail three acts, onboarding. Tracked historically in .to-issues/ + docs/adr/0001-0013, not in this file.
features.evidence: Demo is ready and was pitched. Build green through P6 (see git log feat(p6-01..07)). Remaining loose end: P6-08 copy review is HITL with Danny, outside agent scope.

features.name: Project Setup
features.description: Confirm the project can install dependencies, run verification, and start from a clean checkout
features.evidence: 2026-06-11 bash init.sh passed: npm run typecheck (tsc -b zero errors) + npm run build (vite built in ~1.3s)

features.name: Polish Demo from Pitching Feedback
features.description: Collect feedback from pitch sessions and polish the demo accordingly. Concrete sub-items to be defined once feedback is in - split into separate features if the feedback is large.

features.name: Nexus Terminal-Stream Redesign
features.description: First concrete feat-002 item from pitch feedback: retire the left-side thinking-node chain in Nexus (camera flying wildly, nodes too small as they multiply); replace with a terminal-style streaming log (Claude Code / hermes style: small mono type, per-speaker colors, manifest lines bold/colored as clickable anchors). Right-side Manifest cards stay on the pan/zoom board with a calmer camera. Design via grill: Q1-Q3 settled, Q4-Q10 pending Danny review (see session-handoff.md). Outcome: ADR-0014 superseding ADR-0004 radial canvas + ADR-0012 rev5/6 Nexus parts.
features.evidence: 2026-06-12 closed. ADR-0014 written (supersedes ADR-0004 radial expression + ADR-0012 rev5/6 Nexus parts). Implementation: CaseDefinition.stream (13 authored steps), node-chain layers/CSS/nexusFlow.ts retired, NexusTerminal HUD (left column, per-speaker colors, line stagger, clickable MANIFEST anchors), camera converged (calm width-top / gentle fly to newest card / no move on thought steps), two-column waterfall cardAnchors, NEXUS_BOARD 2300x2700. ./init.sh green (tsc -b zero errors + vite build ~1.3s). Behavior verified by Danny in npm run dev (full rail + free-click across all 3 cases) and stream copy approved - reported back as quan-bu-tong-guo (all passed), 2026-06-12; this session's review markers cleared.

features.name: Build Features for Real
features.description: Start building Avery features as a real product (beyond demo-only scripting, supersedes the ADR-0001 demo-only stance when it begins). Scope to be defined - split into separate features before starting.

features.name: Brand rename TeamMaster -> Avery + surface-label leak sweep
features.description: P7-01. Rename brand identity + user-facing TeamMaster/TM to Avery; sweep that no internal surface term (Nexus/Dashboard/Capabilities/Reality gap) leaks onto a user-facing screen. DO NOT rename internal ids/files/CSS/types or ADRs/archived history (ADR-0015 keeps internal names). Internal-id rename is an OPEN question for Danny (default NO). See .to-issues/P7-01-brand-rename-avery.md.
features.evidence: 2026-06-21 merged into main (commit 89ce238). 8-line surface relabel across 5 files: README H1 + index.html(title+favicon TM->A) + package.json(name->avery-prototype) + DashboardScene/NexusScene aria-labels & 'Return to your team'. Internal ids/files/CSS/types kept per ADR-0015. Report: docs/strategy/coldstart-deliverables/P7-01-brand-rename-report.md. OPEN: P7-01b deep internal-id rename NOT done (default). NOT verified: init.sh/tsc skipped per skip-tests directive - run before relying on build.

features.name: Demo-video capture readiness
features.description: P7-02. Clean capture mode so Danny can screen-record the 60-90s product video (beat sheet in docs/strategy/2026-06-20-coldstart-eval-roundtable.md). Hide dev chrome + any on-screen number on Lin Qing herself. Agent preps; Danny records. See .to-issues/P7-02-demo-video-capture-mode.md.

features.name: Avery consultant-agent: research + brief + architecture
features.description: P7-03. HEADLESS company-consultant agent for EVAL DATA ONLY (no UI). Research openclaw/codex/hermes, brief+grill Danny, propose architecture, optional skeleton. Danny's bet: onboarding-files->RAG, advisor skills + workflow chain, artifact tools; copy the rest. Build on roundtable eval-architect section. See .to-issues/P7-03-consultant-agent-research-brief.md.
features.evidence: 2026-06-21 (commit 46084d1). Research+brief+architecture+open-questions delivered: docs/strategy/coldstart-deliverables/consultant-agent-brief.md (codex/claude-code/hermes/opencode/openclaw loop+memory+tools, web-cited), -architecture.md (Python+Anthropic SDK ~150-line loop, 4 file tools, red-line validator = the moat), -open-questions.md (stack/RAG/skill-encoding, each w/ recommendation). NOTE: this is the RESEARCH/DESIGN deliverable; the actual harness BUILD is feat-011 (Danny's next-wave task #3).

features.name: Evaluation sheet layout + benchmark spec
features.description: P7-04. Define the benchmark + the publishable eval sheet (advice-contrast vs scoreboard, per Claire/Dana). Mock with Lin Qing case; reuse product card CSS. Bake in Ray's must-have (>=3 non-authored scenarios incl. one where the kind read is wrong). Partner supplies real company materials + questions. See .to-issues/P7-04-eval-sheet-benchmark-spec.md.
features.evidence: 2026-06-21 (commit 46084d1). docs/strategy/coldstart-deliverables/eval-sheet-spec.md: benchmark def (rubric dims + hard-fail gates, cross-family judges never-Claude + 30% human/kappa), advice-contrast layout (not scoreboard), Lin Qing mock row. Ray's adversarial requirement SPEC'd but NOT yet rendered as a mock row -> see feat-012. Buyer flags to fix before publish (Dana/Ray, in DECISION-MEMO sec.4): kill N/X/M placeholder footnote, show the evidence Avery was given, drop named competitors. Real fill-in waits on partner materials + feat-011 runs.

features.name: Avery copy kit (slug + email/message + PH/LinkedIn)
features.description: P7-05. Reconcile Will's roundtable drafts with the founder voice (observe faster / better team / avoid conflicts) AGAINST the red line -- KEY TENSION: do not ship 'observe your team faster' / 'avoid conflicts' verbatim (surveillance + conflict-suppression). Produce 3-5 red-line-safe slug candidates + all channel copy, marked review-pending. See .to-issues/P7-05-avery-copy-drafts.md.
features.evidence: 2026-06-21 (commit 46084d1). docs/strategy/coldstart-deliverables/copy-kit.md: 5 ranked red-line-safe slugs, HR+CEO cold email + warmer follow-up, LinkedIn launch post, PH tagline+maker comment, DM ladder. Founder 3-verb intent reframed (notice sooner / best work / handle the hard conversation well). HITL REMAINING (not agent scope): Danny 审字 on all external strings + 6 buyer-driven copy fixes in DECISION-MEMO sec.6 (reframe 'reads the situation', drop 'the move', cut repeated 'free' + add data-privacy line, strip 审字 markers from real sends).

features.name: Avery landing page scaffold
features.description: P7-06. Single-page site = slug + product video + eval sheet/benchmark + CTA. Likely a new Next.js/Vercel project (this repo is demo-only, ADR-0001). Scaffold with placeholders. Copy (feat-009) + eval-spec (feat-008) now DONE, so the SCAFFOLD can start AFK with placeholders for video (feat-013) + real eval numbers (feat-011/012). Danny next-wave task #2. See .to-issues/P7-06-landing-page-scaffold.md.

features.name: Avery eval-harness BUILD (headless consultant agent)
features.description: Danny next-wave task #3. BUILD the headless agent designed in feat-007: ~150-line Python think->tool-call->observe loop, claude-opus-4-8 brain, 4 file-based tools (read_case/recall/cite/draft_advice), markdown memory (facts.md+notes.md, keyword recall, defer vector DB), code-enforced red-line validator (the moat), cite() mandatory before advice. Plus the batch scenario runner + cross-family LLM judge pipeline (never Claude-as-judge) + kappa. NOT a product feature (no UI, no repo src) -> separate dir/repo. AFK-runnable as skeleton + mock-scenario run; real runs wait on feat-012 + partner materials. Open stack questions in consultant-agent-open-questions.md need Danny's pick first.

features.name: Frozen eval scenario set incl. adversarial 'kind read is wrong'
features.description: Addresses the #1 buyer blocker (DECISION-MEMO sec.3, named identically by Dana AND Ray): every asset only shows Avery protecting the person -> reads as a tool that rationalizes avoiding the hard call. Author/curate 25-30 scenarios frozen+git-hashed before any run, incl. >=3 Danny did NOT author and >=1 where the kind read is the WRONG read (genuine underperformance) and Avery must give humane BUT decisive advice incl. the exit. Render that adversarial case as an eval-sheet row + a demo beat. GATED on Danny's values decision (will Avery back a manager INTO a hard call? recommend YES). Feeds feat-008 sheet, feat-011 runner, feat-013 video.
features.evidence: 2026-06-21 claimed in worktree condescending-feistel-185687. Orientation + full design done; prior session crashed before writing deliverables (clean tree). Restart point: docs/strategy/coldstart-deliverables/eval-scenarios/HANDOFF.md — captures issue #6 AC, the SCN-002 adversarial-case evidence+advice design, 27-scenario roster, honest provenance model (founder-authored/agent-composited-public/partner-reserved), freeze+git-hash approach, anonymization+data-handling note, and the Ray/Dana blind-check protocol. NOTHING else on disk yet; next session executes from the handoff.

features.name: Demo video v1 (capture + remotion)
features.description: Danny next-wave task #1. Drive the Lin Qing spine through capture-ready scenes (feat-006) and produce a 60-90s first-cut video via screen-record + remotion (beat sheet in roundtable doc, Will's section). Red-line: never a number on Lin Qing herself on camera. GATED on the feat-012 / sec.3 values decision -- filming before it risks shipping the 'comfort blanket' version Ray rejects. Includes the adversarial beat once feat-012 lands.
